tools.name: search_motorbikes
tools.description: Search for motorcycles on motos.net. Pass the user's full query AND extract any filters explicitly mentioned into their dedicated fields — do NOT infer or guess filter values. If the user mentions a location, extract it into the 'location' field instead of leaving it only in the query. Supported filters: brand, model, fuelType (gasolina/electrico/hibrido), priceMin, priceMax, year (min year), yearTo (max year), kmFrom, kmMax, ccFrom (min engine displacement in cc), ccTo (max engine displacement in cc), hpFrom, hpTo, transmission (manual/automatico), location (Spanish province or city name, e.g. 'Barcelona', 'Madrid'), radiusKm. Use this tool when the user is looking for motorcycles, scooters, or mopeds.
